title: Figure 4 from: Zhou X, Habib K, Zeng W, Ren Y, Shen X, Kang J, Li Q (2024) Addition of three new species of Xylariomycetidae fungi on bamboo from Southern China. MycoKeys 109: 109-129. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.109.128020
author: Zhou, Xin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 4 Arecophila gaofengensis (GMB4541, holotype) A, B ascomata immersed in bamboo host C Cross-section of ascoma D, E longitudinal sections of ascomata F peridium G paraphyses H a J+ subapical ring staining by Melzer's reagent I–K asci with ascospores L–N ascospores surrounded by a gelatinous sheath. Scale bars: 0.5 mm (B–D); 100 μm (E); 10 μm (F–N).
